title: NEW Hermes Agent Updates Change Everything!
summary: Hermes 0.17 introduces a framework for building teams of autonomous AI agents with async sub-agents, loop engineering for quality control, and an Agent Operating System. The update enables no-code automation and business content automation at scale.
writeup: This video covers Hermes 0.17, a framework for building teams of autonomous AI agents. The release adds async sub-agents, loop engineering for quality control, and an Agent Operating System, with a focus on no-code automation and content automation at scale. The practical takeaway is that agents can be coordinated as teams rather than run individually, and the loop engineering component handles quality control across those workflows.
